headline: One price. No surprises.
subheadline: Pick the plan that fits your business. No contracts — cancel anytime.

plans.name: Starter
plans.description: Perfect for businesses that just need a solid, professional online presence.

plans.name: Growth
plans.description: Ideal for active businesses that need small updates from time to time.

plans.name: Priority
plans.description: For businesses that want fast, responsive updates and priority care every month.

note: All plans include a one-time website setup. Your site goes live within 48–72 hours of content approval.
